methods.description: Process for extracting sediment cores from Lake Stechlin to study spatial heterogeneity and perform various analyses.

steps.description: Sediment cores were extracted from the southern bay of the lake.
steps.searchable_summary: extract sediment cores from Lake Stechlin

steps.description: Four adjacent sites were sampled to account for spatial heterogeneity in the sediment.
steps.searchable_summary: sample four adjacent sites for sediment cores

steps.description: Pore water was collected by four in situ dialysis samplers, so-called peepers.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pore water using in situ dialysis samplers

steps.description: Sediment cores were taken with Perspex tubes using gravity corers at 30-m water depth.
steps.searchable_summary: use gravity corers to extract sediment cores at 30-m depth

steps.description: The sediments of the 9-cm cores were sliced directly into 1-cm layers for the uppermost 10 cm and then in 4-cm layers for sediment depths of 10-30 cm.
steps.searchable_summary: slice sediment cores into layers for analysis

methods.description: Analysis of pore water samples to measure various chemical concentrations.

steps.description: The sampled sediment horizons were centrifuged to retrieve pore water.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge sediment samples to extract pore water

steps.description: DOC was measured as non-purgeable organic carbon with an organic carbon analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure DOC using organic carbon analyzer

steps.description: FI was measured following the protocol of [38].
Peeper samples were analyzed for concentrations of SRP and ammonium, dissolved iron, manganese, chloride, nitrate, and sulfate.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze peeper samples for various chemical concentrations

methods.description: Processing of 454 sequencing data using Mothur with specific modifications for quality trimming and alignment.

steps.description: Four hundred fifty-four sequencing data were processed using Mothur with modifications for quality trimming.
steps.searchable_summary: process sequencing data using Mothur with quality trimming

steps.description: The alignment step used SINA against the SILVA v.111 non-redundant SSU reference database.
steps.searchable_summary: align sequences using SINA against SILVA database

steps.description: The sequences were clustered into OTUs at 97% sequence similarity.
steps.searchable_summary: cluster sequences into OTUs at 97% similarity

steps.description: A representative sequence from each OTU was used for taxonomic classification with the least common ancestor method in SINA.
steps.searchable_summary: classify OTUs using least common ancestor method
